---
title: "Tools"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Discover curated tools and utilities for cybersecurity, development, cloud management, and IT operations recommended by chen.ist."
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Interactive <span class="gr">Tools</span></h1>
    <p>Utilities and calculators to assist with technical tasks.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Security Tools</h2>
    <p class="sub">Evaluate and improve your security posture.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-key"></i><h3>Password Strength Checker</h3><p>Evaluate password strength against modern security standards and common attack techniques.</p><ul><li>Entropy calculation</li><li>Dictionary attack detection</li><li>Common pattern identification</li><li>Estimated cracking time</li></ul><a href="password-strength-checker.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i><h3>Zero Trust Assessment</h3><p>Evaluate your organization's Zero Trust security maturity across multiple domains.</p><ul><li>Comprehensive questionnaire</li><li>Domain-specific scoring</li><li>Maturity measurement</li><li>Actionable recommendations</li></ul><a href="zero-trust-assessment.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Self-Assessment</h3><p>Find out if the NIS2 Directive applies to your organization and assess your compliance readiness.</p><ul><li>Applicability check</li><li>Maturity scoring</li><li>Domain breakdown</li><li>Priority action plan</li></ul><a href="nis2-assessment.html" class="m-lk">Launch Tool</a></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-5" style="margin-top:2rem;">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-lock"></i><h3>SSL/TLS Inspector</h3><p>Analyze SSL/TLS certificates for security issues and configuration problems.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Development Tools</h2>
    <p class="sub">Streamline your development workflow.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up"></i><h3>Cloud Cost Calculator</h3><p>Estimate and compare costs across cloud providers.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i><h3>API Request Builder</h3><p>Construct and test REST and GraphQL API requests.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-globe2"></i><h3>Security Headers Analyzer</h3><p>Check HTTP security headers and get recommendations.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Interactive Calculators</h2>
    <p class="sub">Quick calculations for networking and risk analysis.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i><h3>CIDR Subnet Calculator</h3><p>Calculate IP ranges and subnet masks from CIDR notation.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-currency-dollar"></i><h3>Data Breach Cost Estimator</h3><p>Estimate financial impact of a data breach.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Command-Line Tools</h2>
    <p class="sub">Coming soon — download and install on your own infrastructure.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>CloudScan CLI</h3><p>Scan cloud environments for security misconfigurations. Multi-cloud support for AWS, Azure, and GCP.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t" style="opacity:0.5;"><i class="bi bi-eye"></i><h3>SecretScan</h3><p>Detect and prevent secrets in code repositories. Pre-commit hook and CI/CD integration.</p><p style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--c);">Coming soon</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need a custom tool?</h2>
    <p>We build bespoke security and infrastructure tools for organizations.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Talk to our team</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Open-source first &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Enterprise ready &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Custom integrations
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
